response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the reference lyrics for '灰色之証明' (Proof of Gray) and the subsequent talk/announcement segment. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was utilized to guide transcription accuracy, though manual correction was performed on '灰色の手で描く' and fully transcribed the long talking segment (which was absent from reference lyrics). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were calibrated precisely to Tsunomaki Watame's vocalizations, keeping transitions seamless during fast-paced segments, and maintaining silence during the instrumental breaks.

subtitles.original: 綺麗な勝ち方は 望むべくもない
subtitles.english: A clean victory is not something to even hope for

subtitles.original: 華やかさも必要ない それが私だから
subtitles.english: No need for showiness either, because that's who I am

subtitles.original: 歴史はいつだって 勝者が作るモノ
subtitles.english: History is always something made by the winners

subtitles.original: だけど記憶はその限りじゃない
subtitles.english: But memory is not limited to that

subtitles.original: 今この時だけは
subtitles.english: Right now, at least for this moment...

subtitles.original: 決断的な刹那性に飛び込んでいけ
subtitles.english: Jump into this decisive ephemeral nature!

subtitles.original: 灰色の手で描く
subtitles.english: My thoughts drawn with gray hands...

subtitles.original: “私” の思いが
subtitles.english: My thoughts...

subtitles.original: 美しき痛みをも乗り越えて書き換えていく
subtitles.english: Overcoming and rewriting even the beautiful pain!

subtitles.original: 後悔は１ミリもない
subtitles.english: There's not a single millimeter of regret!

subtitles.original: あるのは灼熱だけ
subtitles.english: All there is is a burning passion!

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を蹴り上げるように
subtitles.english: Just like kicking up my own life!

subtitles.original: 始まりは些細 最早どうだっていい
subtitles.english: The beginning was trivial, it doesn't matter anymore

subtitles.original: 突き動かされ指先を伸ばす
subtitles.english: Driven to stretch out my fingertips!

subtitles.original: 現実は残酷だと気付いていないわけじゃない
subtitles.english: It's not that I don't realize reality is cruel

subtitles.original: 諦めるその時は 今ではなかったらしい
subtitles.english: It seems the time to give up wasn't 'now'!

subtitles.original: 灰色の空 赤く もう一度 点火して
subtitles.english: Igniting the gray sky red once more!

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を証明しよう
subtitles.english: Just to prove my own life!

subtitles.original: そこにいた事を刻むように
subtitles.english: As if carving the fact that I was there!

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、新曲！
subtitles.english: Yes! And with that, my new song...

subtitles.original: 『灰色の証明』！
subtitles.english: 'Proof of Gray'!

subtitles.original: やっと披露できた！
subtitles.english: I was finally able to perform it!

subtitles.original: やっと証明できた！
subtitles.english: I was finally able to prove it!

subtitles.original: 聴いてくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for listening!

subtitles.original: この楽曲は、岸田教団&THE明星ロケッツの皆さんにご制作いただきまして
subtitles.english: This song was created by Kishida Kyoudan & THE Akeboshi Rockets,

subtitles.original: スポーツだったり、みんなが頑張りたい時に力になれるような応援ソングを作りたいと思い
subtitles.english: with the hope of creating a cheering song that could give people strength when doing sports or working hard.

subtitles.original: 色々語ったら、かなり熱くてかっこいい楽曲に仕上がりました！
subtitles.english: After discussing many things, it turned into a really passionate and cool song!

subtitles.original: 上手くいかないことがあっても、また立ち上がって前に進む
subtitles.english: Even when things don't go well, rising up again and moving forward...

subtitles.original: わためにとっても背中を押してくれる、そんな特別な楽曲に今回のライブでなりました！
subtitles.english: today's live concert made this a very special song that pushes Watame forward!

subtitles.original: みんなにとってもそうだったら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if it is the same for all of you!

subtitles.original: こちらの新曲MV、いっぱい見て、楽曲もぜひ購入して
subtitles.english: Please watch the MV for this new song a lot, and purchase the track too,

subtitles.original: わための音楽を応援していただけたらとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you could support Watame's music!

subtitles.original: 目指せ、サードライブ！
subtitles.english: Aiming for the 3rd Live!

subtitles.original: あ、ここで、まだ告知していないものが1つありまして。ライブじゃないんですけど、なんと！
subtitles.english: Ah, and here is one more thing I haven't announced yet. It's not a live concert, but...

subtitles.original: どじゃーん！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 『角巻わための Have a nice day』が書籍刊行決定！
subtitles.english: The publication of the book 'Tsunomaki Watame's Have a Nice Day' has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: ということで、ハバナが本になります！
subtitles.english: So, 'Habana' is becoming a book!

subtitles.original: 出版社は『かいけつゾロリ』や『おしりたんてい』などで有名なポプラ社様より
subtitles.english: It will be published by Poplar Publishing, famous for 'Kaiketsu Zorori' and 'Oshiri Tantei',

subtitles.original: オリジナルグッズ付きで12月に刊行予定です！
subtitles.english: and is scheduled for release in December with original merchandise!

subtitles.original: まだ少し先にはなりますが、楽しみに待ってもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: It's still a bit of a way off, but I'd be happy if you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして！どどーん！
subtitles.english: And! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 今年も、角巻わため誕生日記念グッズが受注受付中です！
subtitles.english: Pre-orders for Tsunomaki Watame's birthday commemorative merchandise are open this year too!

subtitles.original: ラインナップを改めて紹介させてくださーい！
subtitles.english: Let me introduce the lineup to you once again!

subtitles.original: ど、ど、ど、ど、どん！
subtitles.english: Do, do, do, do, don!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！ふーみママ描き下ろしの、わためのあったかブランケット！
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Watame's Warm Blanket, illustrated by Fuumi-mama!

subtitles.original: なんと、セクシーです！
subtitles.english: It's actually quite sexy!

subtitles.original: そして、裏面にはわためいとがいます！
subtitles.english: And on the back, there are Watamates!

subtitles.original: 丸めるとね、わためいとの形になりますので、2wayでも使えます。ぜひ温もりを感じてください！
subtitles.english: If you roll it up, it takes the shape of a Watamate, so it can be used in two ways. Please feel the warmth!

subtitles.original: そして、どどどどどん！
subtitles.english: And, do-do-do-do-don!

subtitles.original: わため&わためいと温感マグカップ！
subtitles.english: The Watame & Watamate Thermal Mug!

subtitles.original: こちらは、もた先生に描き下ろしていただきまして
subtitles.english: This one was illustrated by Mota-sensei.

subtitles.original: 最初は夜の風景なんですけど、温かいものを入れていただくとその熱を感知して
subtitles.english: At first it shows a night scene, but when you pour a hot drink inside, it senses the heat...

subtitles.original: 朝の景色に柄が変わるような仕様になっております！
subtitles.english: and the design changes to a morning scene!

subtitles.original: わための配信を意識してデザインしてもらったので
subtitles.english: I had them design it with Watame's streams in mind,

subtitles.original: 配信を見ながらぜひ温かい飲み物を飲んでくださいね！
subtitles.english: so please enjoy a hot drink while watching my streams!

subtitles.original: そして、まだあります！
subtitles.english: And there's still more!

subtitles.original: どどどどどどどどん！
subtitles.english: Do-do-do-do-do-do-do-don!

subtitles.original: わためいとクッション！,s:
subtitles.english: The Watamate Cushion!

subtitles.original: クッションとして使うもよし、飾るもよし
subtitles.english: You can use it as a cushion, or display it as a decoration.

subtitles.original: とっても可愛いクッションなので、ぜひお部屋に...
subtitles.english: It's a very cute cushion, so please add it to your room...
